activites.description: Labyrinthe de souks, caravansérails et mosquées ottomanes.
Plus grande mosquée ottomane du vieux bazar.
Cité antique parmi les mieux conservées au monde.

description_en: Izmir, in Turkey, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.4/5. Muslim travelers will find 99 halal restaurants, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
